title: BuildRequest
description: A request to compose a ContentSpec plus zero or more OverlayBundles into one or more output artifacts or bundles.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

contentSpecRef.description: Reference to the ContentSpec being composed.

overlayRefs.description: Optional overlay bundle refs to apply during composition.

channel.description: Optional release channel target such as dev, qa, or prod.

architecture.description: Optional architecture target such as x86_64 or arm64.

enrollmentProfileRef.description: Optional enrollment profile ref for install/runtime consumption.

parameters.description: Execution-time parameters that do not change the canonical object family.

requestedBy.description: Optional subject or actor ref that requested the build.

requestedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the build request was created.
